title: Steam In Sacrifice.
content:
If meat the gods give, I the steam
    High-towering will devote to them,
    Whose easy natures like it well,
    If we the roast have, they the smell.
meaning:
"Steam In Sacrifice." is a quintessential example of Robert Herrick's signature style...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
